UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A James Robertson II; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Leona Luckett.
Attorney Margaret Pompei appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Keitt is present.
Attorney Keenan Ng representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Oct-22-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
